tools.name: blast_radius
tools.authority_boundary: Traverses Heddle's dated snapshots; does not answer current graph truth.

tools.name: changed
tools.authority_boundary: Returns temporal change facts from git/Heddle store.

tools.name: reverify
tools.authority_boundary: Returns reverify worklists; does not file work or govern changes.

tools.name: timeline
tools.authority_boundary: Returns per-entity change timeline; does not resolve current structure.
